resultTitle.en: You stopped in time. Here's what to do next.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 你及时停下来了。接下来可以这样做。

resultSummary.en: This looks suspicious, but you may have stopped in time. You noticed something suspicious, but you do not appear to have shared information or taken further action.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 这看起来很可疑，但你可能及时停下来了。你注意到了可疑内容，但目前看起来并没有进一步提供信息或继续操作。

text.en: reply to the suspicious message
text.zh-Hans: 回复可疑消息

social.en: reply to the suspicious person on social media or in the chat app
social.zh-Hans: 在社交媒体或聊天软件中回复可疑的人

template.en: Take a screenshot and save {evidence_target} as evidence.

default.zh-Hans: 与这次接触有关的所有内容

text.en: the suspicious message
text.zh-Hans: 可疑消息

email.en: the suspicious email address and email content
email.zh-Hans: 可疑邮箱地址和邮件内容

social.en: the information of the suspicious person you encountered on social media
social.zh-Hans: 你在社交媒体上遇到的可疑人物信息

text.en: If you still feel unsure, verify it through official channels. Do not use the contact details provided by the other party.
text.zh-Hans: 如果你仍然不确定，请通过官方渠道核实。不要使用对方提供的联系方式。

website.en: Report the suspicious link or website

text.en: Delete and block the suspicious message
text.zh-Hans: 删除并拉黑这条可疑消息

email.en: Block, delete, and report the suspicious email address and email content
email.zh-Hans: 拉黑、删除并举报可疑邮箱地址和邮件内容

social.en: Block and report the suspicious person you encountered on social media
social.zh-Hans: 拉黑并举报你在社交媒体上遇到的可疑人物

text.en: If you see similar content again in the future, stop and check first.
text.zh-Hans: 如果以后再次看到类似内容，请先停下来再核实。

text.en: Some of your personal information may already have been partially exposed. Strengthen the protection of your personal information and avoid displaying personal information on suspicious websites and public social media platforms.
text.zh-Hans: 你的部分个人信息可能已经有一定程度的暴露。请加强个人信息保护，避免在可疑网站和公开社交平台上展示个人信息。

summary.zh-Hans: 保护可能已暴露的个人信息

resultTitle.en: You interacted with it, but the risk may still be limited.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 你已经与对方互动过，但风险可能仍然有限。

resultSummary.en: You may have clicked a link, opened a page, or answered a call, but you do not appear to have shared sensitive details.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你可能点击过链接、打开过页面，或接了电话，但目前看起来还没有提供敏感信息。

text.en: replying to the message
text.zh-Hans: 回复消息

social.en: replying to the suspicious person on social media or in the chat app
social.zh-Hans: 在社交媒体或聊天软件中回复可疑的人

template.en: Take a screenshot and save {evidence_target} as evidence.

default.zh-Hans: 与这次接触有关的所有内容

text.en: the suspicious message
text.zh-Hans: 可疑消息

email.en: the suspicious email address and email content
email.zh-Hans: 可疑邮箱地址和邮件内容

social.en: the information of the suspicious person you encountered on social media
social.zh-Hans: 你在社交媒体上遇到的可疑人物信息

summary.en: Close the page or end the call

website.en: Report the suspicious link or website

text.en: Delete and block the suspicious message
text.zh-Hans: 删除并拉黑这条可疑消息

email.en: Block, delete, and report the suspicious email address and email content
email.zh-Hans: 拉黑、删除并举报可疑邮箱地址和邮件内容

social.en: Block and report the suspicious person you encountered on social media
social.zh-Hans: 拉黑并举报你在社交媒体上遇到的可疑人物

summary.zh-Hans: 检查你是否透露了信息

template.en: Think back carefully about whether you {info_check}. If not, the risk is usually lower.
template.zh-Hans: 请仔细回想你是否{info_check}。如果没有，风险通常会比较低。

default.zh-Hans: 填写或透露过任何信息

text.en: replied with any information
text.zh-Hans: 回复过任何信息

template.en: Over the next few days, watch for anything unusual in {monitor_target}.
template.zh-Hans: 接下来几天请留意{monitor_target}是否出现异常。

text.en: your text messages
text.zh-Hans: 你的短信

text.en: Use security software to scan your device and update your phone or computer system in time, to make sure the suspicious link cannot exploit system vulnerabilities to attack your device.
text.zh-Hans: 使用安全软件扫描设备，并及时更新手机或电脑系统，避免可疑链接利用系统漏洞攻击你的设备。

resultTitle.en: Your personal information may have been exposed.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 你的个人信息可能已经泄露。

resultSummary.en: Stop engaging, keep a record, and watch for suspicious follow-up messages or account activity.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 先停止继续互动，保留记录，并留意后续可疑消息或账户活动。

text.en: replying to the message
text.zh-Hans: 回复消息

social.en: replying to the suspicious person on social media or in the chat app
social.zh-Hans: 在社交媒体或聊天软件中回复可疑的人

summary.zh-Hans: 记录你提供了哪些信息

template.en: Take a screenshot and save {evidence_target} as evidence.

default.zh-Hans: 与这次接触有关的所有内容

text.en: the suspicious message
text.zh-Hans: 可疑消息

email.en: the suspicious email address and email content
email.zh-Hans: 可疑邮箱地址和邮件内容

social.en: the information of the suspicious person you encountered on social media
social.zh-Hans: 你在社交媒体上遇到的可疑人物信息

website.en: Report the suspicious link or website

text.en: Delete and block the suspicious message
text.zh-Hans: 删除并拉黑这条可疑消息

email.en: Block, delete, and report the suspicious email address and email content
email.zh-Hans: 拉黑、删除并举报可疑邮箱地址和邮件内容

social.en: Block and report the suspicious person you encountered on social media
social.zh-Hans: 拉黑并举报你在社交媒体上遇到的可疑人物

text.en: Watch over the next period for more impersonation messages, unusual phone calls, or emails.
text.zh-Hans: 接下来一段时间请留意是否还有更多冒充信息、异常电话或邮件出现。

text.en: If you are worried that your identity information may continue to be misused, seek help from official reporting channels as soon as possible.
text.zh-Hans: 如果你担心自己的身份信息还会继续被滥用，请尽快通过官方举报渠道寻求帮助。

text.en: Change your account-related passwords as soon as possible.
text.zh-Hans: 请尽快修改与你账户相关的密码。

text.en: Check with the relevant official service or platform whether your account may be at risk.
text.zh-Hans: 向相关官方服务或平台确认你的账户是否存在风险。

resultTitle.en: You may need to protect your bank account now.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 你现在可能需要保护自己的银行账户。

resultSummary.en: Your account, password, or payment details may be at risk. Secure your accounts as soon as possible and contact your bank or provider if needed.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你的账户、密码或支付信息可能面临风险。请尽快保护相关账户，并在需要时联系银行或服务提供方。

text.en:
If you can still log in to the account, change the password immediately.
If you entered online banking information, or if this bank card is linked to a payment account, immediately change:
• Online banking password
• Mobile banking password
• Payment platform password
• The email password related to the account (if it is the same or similar, change it as well)
text.zh-Hans:
如果你仍然可以登录该账户，请立即修改密码。
如果你填写过网上银行信息，或这张银行卡绑定了支付账户，请立刻修改以下密码：
• 网上银行密码
• 手机银行密码
• 支付平台密码
• 与该账户关联的邮箱密码（如果是相同或相似密码，也要一起修改）

text.en:
Contact your bank or payment platform immediately.
Call the customer service number on the back of your bank card, on the bank's official website, or in the official app.
Do not call any number provided in suspicious messages, emails, or web pages.
text.zh-Hans:
立即联系你的银行或支付平台。
请拨打银行卡背面、银行官网或官方应用中的客服电话。
不要拨打可疑短信、邮件或网页里提供的任何号码。

summary.zh-Hans: 说明你泄露了哪些信息

text.en:
Check recent transaction records immediately.
Open your bank app, online banking, or payment platform and review transactions from the past few days or weeks.
Pay special attention to:
• Small charges you do not recognise
• Repeated charges
• Overseas transactions
• Transfers you did not authorise
• Unfamiliar merchant names
text.zh-Hans:
立即查看最近的交易记录。
打开银行应用、网上银行或支付平台，检查过去几天到几周内的交易。
尤其要留意：
• 你不认识的小额扣款
• 重复扣款
• 境外交易
• 你未授权的转账
• 陌生商户名称

summary.en: Ask about blocking or replacing cards
summary.zh-Hans: 询问是否需要冻结或更换银行卡

text.en: Follow the bank's advice and decide whether you need to freeze the account or replace the bank card.
text.zh-Hans: 按照银行建议，决定是否需要冻结账户或更换银行卡。

text.en:
Save the evidence and do not delete the related information.
Keep as much information related to this incident as possible, such as:
• Screenshots of the suspicious website page
• Screenshots of text messages
• Conversation records
• Screenshots of payment pages
• Records of charges or deductions
• The other party's account, number, website, or email
• The time you contacted the bank and the result
text.zh-Hans:
保存证据，不要删除相关信息。
尽可能保留与这次事件有关的所有资料，例如：
• 可疑网站页面截图
• 短信截图
• 对话记录
• 支付页面截图
• 扣款或交易记录
• 对方的账户、号码、网站或邮箱
• 你联系银行的时间和处理结果

resultTitle.en: Your account or payment details may be at higher risk.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 你的账户或支付信息可能面临更高风险。

resultSummary.en: You may have entered a password, login detail, or verification code. Contact your bank immediately if payment or banking access may be involved.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你可能输入了密码、登录信息或验证码。如果涉及银行或支付账户访问，请立即联系银行。

text.en:
Change the passwords of the relevant accounts immediately.
First change the password of the account where you just entered the password.
If the same password is also used elsewhere, change those accounts as well.
Prioritise changing:
• Email
• Bank or payment platform
• Commonly used shopping platforms
• Social accounts
• Mobile carrier account
text.zh-Hans:
立即修改相关账户的密码。
先修改你刚刚输入密码的那个账户。
如果同一个密码还被用于其他地方，也要一并修改。
优先修改这些账户：
• 邮箱
• 银行或支付平台
• 常用购物平台
• 社交账号
• 运营商账户

summary.zh-Hans: 修改受影响账户的密码

text.en:
If possible, enable or reset two-factor authentication.
If you still have control of the account, do this as soon as possible:
• Enable two-factor authentication
• Re-bind your own phone number or verification method
• Check whether it has been changed to an unfamiliar number, unfamiliar email, or unfamiliar device
text.zh-Hans:
如果可以，请启用或重设双重验证。
如果你仍然掌控该账户，请尽快完成以下操作：
• 启用双重验证
• 重新绑定你自己的手机号或验证方式
• 检查是否被改成了陌生号码、陌生邮箱或陌生设备

text.en:
Check whether the account has been changed.
After logging in, check for these signs:
• Unfamiliar device logins
• Unusual login locations
• Changed phone number or email
• Password changes
• Security notifications you do not recognise
• Account profile changes
• Orders, transfers, or activity records you did not carry out
text.zh-Hans:
检查账户是否已被更改。
登录后请查看这些迹象：
• 陌生设备登录
• 异常登录地点
• 绑定手机号或邮箱被修改
• 密码被改动
• 你不认识的安全通知
• 账户资料被修改
• 不是你本人操作的订单、转账或活动记录

summary.zh-Hans: 检查账户是否已被更改

text.en:
If you entered an SMS verification code, treat it as high risk.
If you gave the code to someone else or entered it on a suspicious page, do not only change the password. Also check whether the account and payment records have already been used.
text.zh-Hans:
如果你输入过短信验证码，请将其视为高风险。
如果你把验证码告诉了别人，或填写在可疑页面上，不要只改密码，还要检查账户和支付记录是否已经被使用。

summary.en: Treat verification codes as high risk
summary.zh-Hans: 把验证码泄露视为高风险

text.en: If the verification code was related to a bank account, bank card, or payment platform, contact the bank immediately.
text.zh-Hans: 如果这个验证码与银行账户、银行卡或支付平台有关，请立即联系银行。

text.en: If you entered a bank card expiry date and CVV, treat it as a bank card risk issue.
text.zh-Hans: 如果你输入了银行卡有效期和 CVV，请将其视为银行卡风险事件。

summary.en: Treat card details as card risk
summary.zh-Hans: 将银行卡信息泄露视为银行卡风险

text.en:
Save the evidence and related records.
Save the following information:
• Screenshots of suspicious pages
• Screenshots of text messages
• Screenshots of emails
• URL links
• The other party's account or contact details
• Unusual notifications
• Transaction records
• The time you contacted the platform or bank and the result
text.zh-Hans:
保存证据和相关记录。
请保留以下信息：
• 可疑页面截图
• 短信截图
• 邮件截图
• URL 链接
• 对方的账户或联系方式
• 异常通知
• 交易记录
• 你联系平台或银行的时间和处理结果

text.en: Continue checking for unusual activity over the next few days: whether you receive new login alerts, whether unfamiliar devices appear again, whether there are unusual charges, whether any account details are changed again, and whether you receive unfamiliar verification codes or security notifications.
text.zh-Hans: 接下来几天继续留意是否还有异常活动，例如是否收到新的登录提醒、是否再次出现陌生设备、是否有异常扣款、账户信息是否再次被修改，以及是否收到陌生验证码或安全通知。

resultTitle.en: Act quickly if money has already been sent.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 如果钱已经转出，请尽快处理。

resultSummary.en: You may already have made a payment or transferred money. Contact your bank or payment provider immediately and keep all transaction records and related evidence.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你可能已经完成付款或转账。请立即联系银行或支付平台，并保留所有交易记录及相关证据。

text.en:
Contact your bank or payment platform immediately.
Immediately contact the bank, card issuer, or payment platform you actually used to make the payment. Use the official app, official website, or the contact details on the back of your bank card.
Do not continue handling this through the number, link, or chat window sent by the other party.
text.zh-Hans:
立即联系你的银行或支付平台。
马上联系你实际使用的银行、发卡机构或支付平台。请通过官方应用、官方网站或银行卡背面的联系方式进行处理。
不要继续通过对方发来的号码、链接或聊天窗口处理此事。

summary.en: Contact your bank or payment provider

text.en: Ask whether the payment can be stopped, disputed, or recovered. Different payment methods may have different handling options.
text.zh-Hans: 询问这笔付款是否可以止付、争议处理或追回。不同支付方式可能有不同的处理选项。

summary.en: Ask about stopping or recovering payment
summary.zh-Hans: 询问是否可以止付或追回款项

text.en:
Save the transaction number, payment screenshots, chat records, and the other party's information.
Do not delete chat records and do not close the page.
Save all information related to this payment, including:
• Payment screenshots
• Transaction records from the bank or payment platform
• Transaction number / reference number
• The other party's name, account number, phone number, or email
• Chat records
• Suspicious text messages, emails, or website screenshots
• Product page or order page
• The reason the other party gave for asking you to pay
• The time you contacted the bank and the result
text.zh-Hans:
保存交易编号、付款截图、聊天记录以及对方信息。
不要删除聊天记录，也不要关闭页面。
请保留与这笔付款有关的所有信息，包括：
• 付款截图
• 银行或支付平台中的交易记录
• 交易编号 / 参考号
• 对方的姓名、账号、电话号码或邮箱
• 聊天记录
• 可疑短信、邮件或网站截图
• 商品页面或订单页面
• 对方要求你付款时给出的理由
• 你联系银行的时间和处理结果

text.en: Do not make any further payments, and do not believe claims like "make one more payment and you can get it back."
text.zh-Hans: 不要再继续付款，也不要相信“再付一笔就能拿回来”这类说法。

text.en: Report it to the police or a scam reporting channel as soon as possible.
text.zh-Hans: 尽快向警方或诈骗举报渠道报告。

text.en: Keep checking whether there is any more unusual activity in the account.
text.zh-Hans: 继续检查账户里是否还有其他异常活动。

resultTitle.en: Your device may have been put at risk.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 你的设备可能已经面临风险。

resultSummary.en: You may have downloaded something, installed software, or allowed someone to access your device. Stop further access immediately and protect your accounts using another safe device.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你可能下载了文件、安装了软件，或让他人访问了你的设备。请立即停止继续访问，并使用另一台安全设备保护账户。

text.en:
Immediately stop the other party from continuing to operate your device.
If the other party is still on the call, in the chat, remotely connected, or screen-sharing, stop it at once.
What you should do now:
• Hang up the call
• End the chat
• Close remote control or screen sharing
• Do not click any buttons as instructed by the other party
• Do not open bank, payment, or verification code pages for them to see
text.zh-Hans:
立即阻止对方继续操作你的设备。
如果对方仍在通话、聊天、远程连接或屏幕共享，请立刻中止。
你现在应该做的是：
• 挂断电话
• 结束聊天
• 关闭远程控制或屏幕共享
• 不要再按对方指示点击任何按钮
• 不要让对方看到银行、支付或验证码页面

text.en: If you are worried about the risk, disconnect from the network first (Wi-Fi, mobile data, Bluetooth, wired connection).
text.zh-Hans: 如果你担心风险，可以先断开网络连接（Wi‑Fi、移动数据、蓝牙、有线连接）。

summary.zh-Hans: 如有需要先断开设备网络

text.en:
Delete the suspicious app, software, or file you just installed.
Deleting it may help, but it does not necessarily mean the risk has been fully removed.
text.zh-Hans:
删除你刚刚安装的可疑应用、软件或文件。
删除可能会有所帮助，但并不一定代表风险已经完全消除。

text.en:
Use another safe device to change important passwords.
Prioritise these accounts:
• Email
• Bank / payment platform
• Commonly used shopping platforms
• Social accounts
• Mobile carrier account
text.zh-Hans:
使用另一台安全设备修改重要密码。
优先修改这些账户：
• 邮箱
• 银行 / 支付平台
• 常用购物平台
• 社交账号
• 运营商账户

summary.en: Change passwords from a safe device
summary.zh-Hans: 在安全设备上修改密码

text.en: If you logged in to bank or payment accounts on that device, contact the bank as well.
text.zh-Hans: 如果你曾在那台设备上登录过银行或支付账户，也请一并联系银行。

summary.en: Contact your bank if accounts were used
summary.zh-Hans: 如涉及账户使用，请联系银行

text.en:
Check whether your phone or computer is behaving unusually.
Check for things such as:
• The device becoming very slow
• Strange pages popping up automatically
• Apps or programs appearing that you did not open
• Battery draining unusually fast
• Messages or emails being sent automatically
• Unfamiliar login alerts
• Camera or microphone turning on unexpectedly
• Unusual bank or payment account notifications
text.zh-Hans:
检查你的手机或电脑是否出现异常表现。
例如留意：
• 设备明显变慢
• 自动弹出奇怪页面
• 出现你没有打开过的应用或程序
• 电量异常快速消耗
• 自动发送短信或邮件
• 陌生登录提醒
• 摄像头或麦克风意外开启
• 异常的银行或支付账户通知

summary.zh-Hans: 检查设备是否有异常表现

text.en: Check whether there are unfamiliar remote control permissions or accessibility permissions.
text.zh-Hans: 检查是否存在陌生的远程控制权限或辅助功能权限。

text.en:
Save evidence, but do not keep dealing with the other party.
Suggested items to save:
• Call records
• Chat records
• Screenshots of the download page
• The name of the installed software
• Links sent by the other party
• The actions the other party told you to perform
• Screenshots of unusual prompts or pop-ups
text.zh-Hans:
保存证据，但不要继续和对方周旋。
建议保留这些资料：
• 通话记录
• 聊天记录
• 下载页面截图
• 已安装软件的名称
• 对方发来的链接
• 对方要求你执行的操作
• 异常提示或弹窗截图

text.en:
If you are not sure whether the device is safe, do not use it to do these things for now.
Before you confirm the device is safe, try not to use it for:
• Logging in to email
• Logging in to bank accounts
• Entering bank card details
• Entering verification codes
• Saving new passwords
• Handling large payments
text.zh-Hans:
如果你不确定这台设备是否安全，暂时不要用它做以下事情。
在确认设备安全之前，尽量不要用它来：
• 登录邮箱
• 登录银行账户
• 输入银行卡信息
• 输入验证码
• 保存新密码
• 处理大额付款

summary.zh-Hans: 避免继续进行高风险账户操作

text.en: If the risk is high, consider asking a professional to inspect the device.
text.zh-Hans: 如果风险较高，可以考虑请专业人员检查设备。

summary.zh-Hans: 如有需要寻求技术帮助

resultTitle.en: This may already be affecting your account or money.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 这可能已经影响到你的账户或资金。

resultSummary.en: You have already noticed suspicious activity. Focus on the fastest actions first and keep a full record.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你已经发现了可疑活动。请优先处理最紧急的事项，并完整保留记录。

text.en:
Contact the bank, card issuer, or payment platform first.
• Use the official bank app, bank customer service number, or payment platform help centre
• Ask them to freeze, pause, reverse, or urgently review suspicious transactions if possible
• If more than one payment method is affected, start with the one most likely to cause further loss
text.zh-Hans:
先联系银行、发卡机构或支付平台。
• 使用官方银行应用、银行客服电话或支付平台帮助中心
• 尽量要求对方冻结、暂停、撤销或紧急审查可疑交易
• 如果不止一种支付方式受影响，请先处理最可能继续造成损失的那一种

summary.en: Contact the bank or payment provider first
summary.zh-Hans: 先联系银行或支付平台

text.en:
Contact the affected account service provider first.
• Use the official security page, official help centre, or official support number
• Tell them the account may already have been accessed, changed, or used without permission
• If more than one account is affected, start with the one that could lead to the fastest further loss
text.zh-Hans:
先联系受影响的账户服务提供方。
• 使用官方安全页面、官方帮助中心或官方客服电话
• 告知对方，该账户可能已经被访问、被更改或被未经许可使用
• 如果不止一个账户受影响，请先处理最可能最快继续造成损失的那个

summary.zh-Hans: 先联系账户服务提供方

text.en:
Treat the device issue as urgent and contact the most affected provider first.
• If the device issue may affect your bank or payment access, contact the bank or payment provider first
• If the device issue may affect an email, social, or shopping account, contact that account provider first
• Prioritise the area most likely to cause further loss
text.zh-Hans:
将设备问题视为紧急情况，并先联系受影响最严重的服务方。
• 如果设备问题可能影响你的银行或支付访问，请先联系银行或支付平台
• 如果设备问题可能影响邮箱、社交或购物账户，请先联系对应账户服务方
• 优先处理最可能继续造成损失的部分

summary.zh-Hans: 优先处理受影响最严重的服务方

text.en: Clearly tell them that you have already noticed unusual activity.
text.zh-Hans: 清楚地告诉对方，你已经发现了异常活动。

text.en:
Secure the affected account immediately.
• Change the password immediately
• Log out all unfamiliar devices
• Check whether the bound email or phone number has been changed
• Reset two-factor authentication
text.zh-Hans:
立即保护受影响的账户。
• 立即修改密码
• 登出所有陌生设备
• 检查绑定的邮箱或手机号是否被修改
• 重设双重验证

text.en:
Secure the affected bank card or payment method immediately.
• Contact the bank or payment platform
• Ask whether the account needs to be frozen, the card replaced, or transactions paused
• Check recent transaction records
text.zh-Hans:
立即保护受影响的银行卡或支付方式。
• 联系银行或支付平台
• 询问是否需要冻结账户、更换银行卡或暂停交易
• 检查最近交易记录

summary.zh-Hans: 保护受影响的支付方式

text.en:
Secure the affected device immediately.
• Stop using the suspicious device for important tasks
• Use another safe device to change passwords
• Check for suspicious software, remote access, or unusual permissions
• Refer to the device access guidance in Stage G if needed
text.zh-Hans:
立即保护受影响的设备。
• 停止使用可疑设备处理重要事项
• 使用另一台安全设备修改密码
• 检查是否存在可疑软件、远程访问或异常权限
• 如有需要，请参考 Stage G 中关于设备访问的指引

text.en:
Record clearly what unusual activity happened and when it started.
• What unusual activity you noticed
• When you first noticed it
• Which account, card, or platform was involved
• How much money was involved
• Whether you received texts, emails, verification codes, or alerts
• What actions you have already taken
• When you contacted the bank, platform, or service provider
• What reply they gave
text.zh-Hans:
清楚记录发生了哪些异常活动，以及它们是什么时候开始的。
• 你注意到的异常情况是什么
• 你第一次发现是在什么时候
• 涉及的是哪个账户、银行卡或平台
• 牵涉的金额是多少
• 你是否收到了短信、邮件、验证码或提醒
• 你已经采取了哪些行动
• 你何时联系了银行、平台或服务方
• 对方给了什么回复

text.en:
Suggested items to save:
• Screenshots of unusual transactions
• Screenshots showing account balance changes
• Login alerts or security notifications
• Verification code messages
• Email notifications
• Chat records
• Suspicious links or page screenshots
• Order records
• The other party's account, number, email, or username
• The time and outcome of your communication with the bank or platform
text.zh-Hans:
建议保存这些资料：
• 异常交易截图
• 显示账户余额变化的截图
• 登录提醒或安全通知
• 验证码短信
• 邮件通知
• 聊天记录
• 可疑链接或页面截图
• 订单记录
• 对方的账户、号码、邮箱或用户名
• 你与银行或平台沟通的时间和结果

text.en:
Continue reporting and handling the matter through official channels.
• Official bank customer service number
• Official bank app
• Payment platform help centre
• Account service provider's official security page
• Official scam reporting or police reporting channel
text.zh-Hans:
继续通过官方渠道举报和处理此事。
• 官方银行客服电话
• 官方银行应用
• 支付平台帮助中心
• 账户服务提供方的官方安全页面
• 官方诈骗举报或警方报案渠道

summary.zh-Hans: 通过官方渠道继续处理

text.en: Continue checking whether there is any further unusual activity.
text.zh-Hans: 继续检查是否还有进一步的异常活动。

text.en: If loss has already happened, do not continue doing more risky actions.
text.zh-Hans: 如果已经发生损失，不要再继续进行更多高风险操作。

summary.zh-Hans: 避免继续进行高风险操作
